title: Curriculum Developer Vacancy at Jamboree Education Asia Pacific Associates - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Curriculum Developer Vacancy at Jamboree Education Asia Pacific Associates - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at Jamboree Education Asia Pacific Associates. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Curriculum Developer to strengthen our Bengaluru-based team.

About Jamboree Education Asia Pacific Associates:
Jamboree Education Asia Pacific Associates is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Conduct parent-teacher meetings and update parents on student performance
• Conduct doubt-clearing sessions and remedial classes for weak students
• Design formative and summative assessments aligned to learning objectives
• Develop and deliver engaging lesson plans for students
• Support students with special educational needs
• Contribute to school newsletter, blogs, and other publications
• Create curriculum-aligned learning materials and assessments

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Curriculum Development
• Proficiency in MS Office
• Proficiency in Child Psychology
• Proficiency in Zoom/Teams
• Proficiency in LMS Platforms
• Proficiency in Data Analysis
• Proficiency in Classroom Management
• Proficiency in Content Creation

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Bengaluru, Karnataka, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Jamboree Education Asia Pacific Associates!
